race.comment: DANCINGONTHEROSSO (8) justified the favouritism on debut when she came from back in the field with a sharp victory over 1205m at Tuncurry in the heavy (10) conditions. Has further upside and well placed with Smyth's 3kg claim. SAVVYROCKER (1) back in class on the back-up after failing to close off from the wide gate with a battling seventh over 1250m at this track. Drawn out again and capable of better in this easier contest. CASINO COLLECTION (6) in career best form and has a good record at this trip. Bounced off her Maiden win two-back, with a narrow third over 1420m at Grafton. Sure to go well again. COCO DREAMING (2) worth another chance today after covering plenty of ground in the run with a tiring ninth over 1190m at Grafton. Maps well and has solid claims.
